title: Bogga internetka ee IATF
summary: Bogga dadweynaha ee Kooxda Shaqada ee Helitaanka Caalamiga ah.
problem: IATF waxay u baahneed meel xasilooni ah oo ay ku sheegeen qaabka, qorshayaasha, iyo tilmaamaha dadka wax ku biirinaya talaabada xigta ee saxda ah.
why: Boggu waa albaabka hore ee dadweynaha ee IATF. Waxaa loo dhisay sidii mashruuc yar oo xasilloon si ay u fududaato in la akhriyo, loo turjumo, loona ilaaliyo meel bannaan.
scopeIn: Bogagga dadweynaha ee sharaxaya qaabka IATF
Diiwaanka dadweynaha ee mashaariicda IATF ee la aqbalay, kuwa firfircoon, iyo kuwa la keydiyay oo leh xaalad, dayactir, keyd, iyo bandhig
Qoraal Ingiriis ah oo qaab dhismeedkiisu diyaar u yahay turjumaadda
Macmiilka Cloudflare ee ku shaqeeya hantida ma guurtada ah (static deployment on CloudFlare Workers Static Assets)
scopeOut: Meelaha xubnaha gaarka loo leeyahay, xisaabaadka, ama socodka gelitaanka
Martigelinta koodhka isha ee mashruuca, kaas oo ku nool keydka mashruuc kasta
Wada sheekeysiga waqtiga dhabta ah, kaas oo ku nool Khilaafka
Raadinta arrimaha mashaariicda gaarka ah, oo ku nool keydka GitHub ee mashruuc kasta

title: Sawir gacmeedka IATF
summary: Nooc hore oo IATF ah, oo la keydiyay ka dib markii la gaadhay barta joogsiga dabiiciga ah.
problem: Baadhitaan hore oo ku saabsan qalab ku wajahan helitaanka shaqaalaha oo hoos yimaada hay'adda IATF.
why: Kaydinta waxaa loo hayaa dadweynaha sida diiwaanka shaqada, xitaa haddii horumarka firfircoon la joojiyay.
scopeIn: Tijaabada hore ee qalab ku wajahan helitaanka oo lagu keydiyo diiwaanka dadweynaha
scopeOut: Isticmaalka lagu taliyey ee wax soo saarka

title: Qalabka IATF
summary: Robot bulsho oo IATF ah, oo la keydiyay ka dib markii ay gaareen barta joogsiga dabiiciga ah.
why: Kaydinta waxaa loo hayaa dadweynaha sida diiwaanka shaqada, xitaa haddii horumarka firfircoon la joojiyay.
scopeIn: Qalabaynta khilaafka ee hareeraha kanaalada bulshada ee IATF, oo loo haysto diiwaanka dadweynaha
scopeOut: Isticmaalka lagu taliyey ee wax soo saarka
